role: Core pipeline execution tasks for the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibility: Collectively orchestrate the end-to-end pipeline stages including scanning, AST extraction, summarization, validation, aggregation, reverse indexing, view derivation, documentation backfill, state commitment, and cleanup operations.

children.role: Pipeline task for hierarchical content aggregation, collecting directories and projects that require aggregation and delegating to the aggregator engine for ordered processing.
Core pipeline task for AST extraction and symbol registration within the ArchSpine mirror system.
Pipeline task module for backfilling project documentation by generating markdown content from JSON data via LLM prompts, with content hash tracking for idempotency.
SpineTask implementation for the automated LLM-driven architectural violation fixing stage in the pipeline.
Pipeline task for lightweight source code summarization, processing filtered files from the extraction stage and delegating to a dedicated summarization method.
Pipeline stage task orchestrating post-commit derivation of views, aggregations, and reverse indices.
ArchSpine reconciliation task that synchronizes the manifest's file status with the actual repository state, validates index document compatibility, and updates cache metadata.
Core pipeline task for constructing reverse dependency edges from forward dependency index files.
Pipeline stage task for scanning the filesystem, detecting orphaned and changed files, and cleaning up tracked state in the ArchSpine manifest and output directory.
Pipeline stage task for committing synchronized file state (hashes and metadata) to the SQLite database after AST extraction and LLM summarization are complete.
ArchSpine summarization stage task module implementing SpineTask interface to orchestrate LLM-based semantic summary generation from extraction stage outputs.
ArchSpine validation pipeline task that orchestrates LLM-powered architectural rule compliance checks on scanned source files, normalizing and persisting violation results.

Pipeline task stage that orchestrates selective derivation of architectural views (public surface, risk hotspots, architecture diagram) using the ViewService facade, based on enabled views configuration.
